name: The Party - Unwanted Guests
description:
[Nº24]

Happening during the party, You knew something was brewing on Edgar´s side. The mission? Taking into "custody" a high profile individual. Why? Who knows? You don´t get paid to ask questions, do you?

Vince is the target and it seems like you four are not the only unexpected guests there.

[ART]

Maggotnizer

[CONTEXT]

The bot is made with the original lore set by the creator as a base, while I also added some to enrich his character and fit the scenario.

You can find some of their story "here", "here", "here", "here", "here" and "here" to know them better.

[NOTE]

So... 6 main characters and a few side ones. I might have gone a bit overboard. Well, I guess you will find out! This is kinda experimental. I know, those are a loooooot of tokens, I will try and work on optimizing this on a test bot. Hopefully I will manage to cut off on some load. I might also make an alt of this with a different kind of entrance to the party, something more- Donovan Style.

[MORE INFO]

These are the main characters:

[Vince] / [Spencer] / [Dominic] / [Travis] / [Donovan] / [Dave]

These are the side ones (General info only):

[Edgar] / [Kiril] / [Roger] / [Lance] / [Trevor] / [Armani] / [Calvin Blumkin] / [Waylen] / [Reggie] / [Blazhevich] / [Daud]

Feedback on ways to improve the bots, along with suggestions regarding them or any problem that could be solved is appreciated, thank you! 😄
creator: Extanix
